mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO translog (imtcode, buy_currency, sell_currency, bid, ask, valid_from, valid_till, rate_quote_id, version) VALUES
(#{item.imtcode}, #{item.buyCurrency}, #{item.sellCurrency}, #{item.bid}, #{item.ask}, #{item.validFrom}, #{item.validTill}, #{item.rateQuoteID}, #{item.version})
